gist.headline: The hive drops a beat
gist.blurb: We taught the hive how to make music. ACE-Step 1.5 Turbo is now live on the audio API, turning your text prompts into full stereo tracks in seconds.
gist.summary: Integrated the ACE-Step 1.5 Turbo model into the audio API for fast, high-quality music generation.
gist.impact: Developers and creators can now generate 15 to 30-second stereo music tracks from simple text prompts in under 12 seconds.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing DJ headphones at a retro mixing console or synthesizer. The chunky monitor robot dancing to the beat. Musical notes floating in the air. Represents the new music generation capabilities.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, mixing tracks on a retro synthesizer desk. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head dances nearby, with pixelated musical notes floating in the air. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'BEATS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
